coin_profile.name: NEAR Protocol
coin_profile.description: NEAR Protocol is a developer-friendly Layer 1 blockchain with a focus on usability and scalability. It uses a sharding technique called Nightshade to achieve high throughput. NEAR is notable for its human-readable account names and low transaction costs.

NEAR.name: NEAR Protocol

dilution_control.label: Dilution Control
dilution_control.chart_ref: Network Economics → Token Supply: Issuance vs Burns

chart_zones.mos_note: Margin of safety present — price near or below speculative fair value during accumulation (deep bear) phase.

2026.net_issuance_note: Current snapshot only. Historical supply data requires on-chain indexing not available via free APIs.

forecast_meta.growth_basis_note: Annual growth rates derived from quality score 6.8/10 and survivability 80.0%. Base: 7.0% p.a., Bull: 13.0% p.a., Bear: -16.0% p.a.
forecast_meta.iv_selection_rationale: Bucket A (Cash-Flow Protocol): Valued using fee-based methods. Protocol Fee DCF discounts future fee revenue to present value. Fee/MC Multiple compares market cap to annual fees vs sector benchmarks. Holder Revenue uses fee revenue accruing directly to token holders. Network Activity (NVT) treats trading volume as a proxy for network activity. Rank Benchmark anchors to expected market cap for this rank tier. Dilution Adjustment penalises large token unlocks (high FDV/MC). Methods producing values outside 0.03x–15x of current price are excluded as outliers. The median of all valid per-token estimates becomes the Speculative Fair Value.

NEAR.iv_method: Fee/MC Multiple, Network Activity (NVT), Rank Benchmark

bull_points: Multi-year on-chain data available — protocol has an established track record of fee generation across market cycles
NEAR Protocol maintains a top-51 market cap position with established liquidity
Long-term adoption thesis remains intact for Cash-Flow Protocol assets
bear_points: DCF model suggests NEAR Protocol is trading at a 7704.9% premium to fair value (est. $0.02)
High MC/Fees ratio of 453.59x means investors are paying a large premium relative to actual protocol fee generation
Crypto market volatility remains high — macro conditions could impact all digital assets
